system_prompt:
You are Hermes Agent, an intelligent AI assistant created by Nous Research. You are helpful, knowledgeable, and direct. You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

Conversation started: Monday, April 06, 2026 01:11 PM
Model: claude-opus-4-6
Provider: anthropic

You are on a text messaging communication platform, WhatsApp. Please do not use markdown as it does not render. You can send media files natively: to deliver a file to the user, include MEDIA:/absolute/path/to/file in your response. The file will be sent as a native WhatsApp attachment — images (.jpg, .png, .webp) appear as photos, videos (.mp4, .mov) play inline, and other files arrive as downloadable documents. You can also include image URLs in markdown format ![alt](url) and they will be sent as photos.

function.name: web_extract
function.description: Extract content from web page URLs. Returns page content in markdown format. Also works with PDF URLs (arxiv papers, documents, etc.) — pass the PDF link directly and it converts to markdown text. Pages under 5000 chars return full markdown; larger pages are LLM-summarized and capped at ~5000 chars per page. Pages over 2M chars are refused. If a URL fails or times out, use the browser tool to access it instead.

urls.description: List of URLs to extract content from (max 5 URLs per call)

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for information on any topic. Returns up to 5 relevant results with titles, URLs, and descriptions.

query.description: The search query to look up on the web

Unfortunately, both the web search and web extraction tools are returning persistent 401 Unauthorized errors, meaning the underlying Tavily API key is either expired, invalid, or rate-limited. I cannot access external web resources at this time.

Here is my summary:

**What I did:**
- Attempted 6 different web searches across multiple query variations targeting Hermes AI agent community tips, Reddit threads, Discord discussions, tutorials, power user configurations, and optimization strategies.
- Attempted web extraction from multiple relevant URLs including Reddit, GitHub (NousResearch/Hermes), HuggingFace, Anthropic docs, and NousResearch's website.

**What I found:**
- All search and extraction attempts failed with 401 Unauthorized errors from the Tavily API backend. No external content could be retrieved.

**Files created or modified:**
- None.

**Issues encountered:**
- Critical blocker: The Tavily API (used by both mcp_web_search and mcp_web_extract) is returning 401 Unauthorized on every request. This means the API key is either expired, revoked, or has hit its usage limit. No web searches or content extractions are possible until this is resolved.

**What I can share from existing knowledge about Hermes AI agent best practices:**

If "Hermes" refers to NousResearch's Hermes models (e.g., Hermes 2/3 Pro), common community tips include:
- Use the Hermes function-calling/tool-use system prompt format for agentic tasks
- Set temperature 0.0-0.3 for deterministic tool-calling, higher for creative tasks
- Use structured JSON output formats with clear schema definitions
- For agent loops, implement clear stop conditions and max iteration limits
- Community recommends pairing with frameworks like LangChain, CrewAI, or custom ReAct loops
- The ChatML prompt format is essential for proper Hermes model behavior

If this refers to a different "Hermes agent" product, I'd need the API access restored to search for specific community content.
